# Paralegal Service for you — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Paralegal Service

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Unlock affordable legal services that put you first. From legal aid services of oklahoma to mental hygiene legal solutions, get the support you deserve. Start your journey now.

### Services
https://example.com/services
Discover tailored mental hygiene legal services, arag legal services guidance, and more. Affordable, caring paralegal expertise designed to protect your rights. See how we help.

### About
https://example.com/about
Learn why we champion affordable legal services and partner with legal aid services of oklahoma. Real people, real commitment, real results for your legal peace of mind.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready for affordable legal services that deliver? Connect for mental hygiene legal services, arag legal services, or general aid. Your solution starts with one message.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)
